transcript: Um, why does no one talk about how overpowered Arizona is for traveling? I mean, look at all these places. You've got The Wave, Antelope Canyon, Havasu Falls, Monument Valley, Horseshoe Bend, Hoover Dam, and the Grand Canyon, just to name a couple. And that doesn't even include the vast landscape that stretches for eternity.

timestamps.text: Um, why does no one talk about how overpowered Arizona is for traveling?
I mean, look at all these places.

And that doesn't even include the vast landscape that stretches for eternity.
